title: Kachche Dhaage
subTitle: Stepbrothers Aftab and Jai, who loathe each other, must learn to put aside their differences and work together to prove their innocence in a terrorism case.

title: Bhumika: The Role
subTitle: Urvashi who becomes an actress with the help of Keshav, ends up marrying him. However, things complicate when she indulges in affairs with prominent men in the film industry.

title: Colors Cineplex Bollywood
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Chhote Sarkar
subTitle: Amar, a rich businessman, is framed by two undercover police officers, Seema and Jagmohan, for the murder of his uncle. To evade prison, he claims to be of unsound mind and tries to solve the mystery.

title: Hum
subTitle: A man is determined to kill a cruel businessman to get revenge for his father's death but is stopped by an inspector who is the mastermind behind the troubles.

title: Mujhse Dosti Karoge!
subTitle: Raj falls in love with Tina after their friendship blossoms via emails. However, he is unaware that Tina's best friend, Pooja, is the one writing these mails.

title: Pyar To Hona Hi Tha
subTitle: Sanjana is desperate to revive her hopeless relationship with Rahul. However, when the brooding and mysterious Shekhar comes along, her heart starts gravitating towards a new possibility.

title: Yodha
subTitle: Captain Ram, a military commando, rescues Patil, the tourism minister of Karnataka from terrorists. However, chaos ensues as the official asks him to provide security after taking a liking for his heroics.

title: Ram Avtar
subTitle: Childhood friends Ram and Avtar face a love triangle when Ram falls for Sangeeta, whom Avtar also loves. Ram sacrifices his love for Avtar, but their enemy Gundappaswami threatens to expose the truth.

title: Ram Avtar
subTitle: Childhood friends Ram and Avtar face a love triangle when Ram falls for Sangeeta, whom Avtar also loves. Ram sacrifices his love for Avtar, but their enemy Gundappaswami threatens to expose the truth.

title: Natak
subTitle: Asha, who loves another man, wants to stop her wedding and requests her best friend, Sunita, to impersonate her in front of her betrothed. Later, she asks her to marry her fiance.

title: Pyar Ke Do Pal
subTitle: Twins Sunil and Anil try to reunite their parents who separated many years ago due to a tragic misunderstanding regarding a friend's wish to have an abortion.

title: Colors Cineplex Bollywood
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Lajja
subTitle: Trapped within the confines of a male-dominated society, four courageous women fight their battles, each unrelated yet resonant with the others.

title: Bichhoo
subTitle: Jeeva, a young man, becomes a professional assassin after the death of his family and girlfriend. Later, he meets Kiran and takes her under his wing so that she can avenge her family.

title: Raghuveer
subTitle: Ravi, an honest policeman, leads the bodyguard team of the chief minister. When his college-going brother, Raghuveer, is arrested and jailed, Ravi breaks all ties with him out of embarrassment.

title: Arjun Pandit
subTitle: A mild-mannered professor's world shatters after betrayal drives him into a violent transformation, where love and rage collide on the streets of Mumbai.

title: Darr
subTitle: Swept up in a whirlwind of fear and romance, Kiran teeters on the edge of a mental and emotional precipice. While Sunil keeps holding on to her, Rahul spares no effort to drag her down with himself.

title: Ek Hi Raasta
subTitle: Army officer Vikram works with terrorist Kubla and steals vital army information for him. In the process, he ends up killing a colleague and pins the blame on a fellow soldier.

title: Ek Hi Raasta
subTitle: Army officer Vikram works with terrorist Kubla and steals vital army information for him. In the process, he ends up killing a colleague and pins the blame on a fellow soldier.

title: Sau Din Saas Ke
subTitle: Durga marries Prakash, unaware of his mother Bhawani Devi's dominating and abusive nature. She later insists on moving in with his family in order to teach Bhawani Devi a lesson.

title: Kartoos
subTitle: ACP Jay Suryavanshi assigns an inmate on death row, Jeet, the task of killing Jagat, a terrorist. Things take a turn when Jeet falls in love with Mini and gets distracted from his mission.
